name: sidekick
description: Sidekick — a collection of AI coding agents as Codex sidekicks. Forge, Kay, and Codex are the current sidekicks: Forge and Kay can be installed and configured through Sidekick, while Codex delegates to the local OpenAI Codex CLI. Codex consumes the canonical Sidekick skills directly.

interface.shortDescription: AI coding-agent sidekick workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: Sidekick exposes the canonical Sidekick skill workflows directly in Codex while keeping the shared hook and runtime packaging in the plugin bundle.
defaultPrompt: Use Sidekick to coordinate implementation work.
